use_cases: Displaying paginated tabular data with sortable columns for admin dashboards
Showing user or customer lists with built-in search and filter capabilities
Presenting structured data in a clean, accessible format for SaaS applications
Managing inventory or order data in e-commerce backends
Creating data grids for any application requiring structured information display
ai_summary: A MUI X DataGrid-based table component with sorting, pagination, and dark mode support. Features a Paper wrapper with shadow and rounded corners, displaying columns for ID, names, and age with a computed full name field. Clean, minimal styling suitable for dashboards and admin interfaces across various industries.
